body: Traced the issue to the child theme's style.css — the hero wrapper was missing a min-height declaration after the theme update. Added .hero-wrapper { min-height: 480px; } and tested on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari.
WP Mail SMTP was using the default PHP mailer. Switched to Gmail SMTP with the church office Google Workspace credentials. Test email delivered successfully. Closing this issue.

Exported 47 sermon posts from WordPress using the built-in XML exporter. Now mapping fields to the Webflow CMS schema. Custom fields (scripture_ref, audio_url, series_name) need to be CMS text fields in Webflow.
Made progress on sermon import. Using a Python CSV script to batch-upload via Webflow CMS API. Hit the 10k item limit on the free plan — upgrading to CMS plan first.

Stripe account approved for Shiloh Baptist Church 501(c)(3). EIN verified. Working through nonprofit rate setup (2.2% + $0.30 per transaction). Will use Stripe Payment Element embedded in a Webflow custom code embed.
Payment element is rendering in staging. Testing three giving categories: Tithe, Building Fund, Missions. Need Pastor Wilkins to approve the receipt email wording before going live.

Checked the Certbot cron on shiloh-web-01. The renew script is present at /etc/cron.d/certbot but the dry run failed: certbot renew --dry-run exiting with error on the DNS challenge. Investigating Cloudflare API token permissions.
All 5 plugin updates applied to staging. No conflicts detected. Yoast SEO 23.4 added a new Schema.org field for churches — left at default. Applied to production. Site is green.

New hero banner image uploaded from the April outdoor service. Pastor Wilkins reviewed on mobile — requested the text overlay contrast be increased. Adjusting the dark gradient overlay opacity from 0.4 to 0.6.
Added VBS June 22-26 and Church Picnic July 4 to the events calendar. Working through the fall events. Need the exact Revival dates confirmed by Pastor before adding.

Confirmed the Webflow form notification email was set to an old address. Updated to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. However, test submissions still not arriving. Suspecting Webflow's email domain may be on a blocklist. Checking with Webflow support.

Ran Lighthouse on the current production homepage. Score: 58 mobile, 82 desktop. Top opportunities: convert hero JPEG (2.1MB) to WebP (-1.4MB estimated saving), preconnect to Google Fonts CDN, defer non-critical Webflow Lottie script.
Hero image converted to WebP via Squoosh. File size down from 2.1MB to 380KB. Uploaded to Webflow assets and updated the CMS entry. Retesting Lighthouse — expecting score improvement to 70+.

WordPress 6.7 update applied on staging 2026-01-28. Tested all pages — only minor Gutenberg block alignment issue on the Deacon Board page, fixed with a CSS override. Applied to production 2026-02-03.
Children's ministry page updated with Kingdom Kids and Roots & Wings curriculum. New teacher roster added as a table. Gloria Tate reviewed and approved. Published.
Received revised church history copy from Pastor Wilkins via email. Also received a ZIP with 12 anniversary photos. Need to compress photos and upload to Webflow assets before updating the page.
Started the gallery accessibility audit. Of 45 images, 38 have empty alt attributes. Using the Webflow CMS to add alt text field to the Gallery collection. Will batch-update via Webflow API.

Weekly bulletin PDF upload system design decision: going with Webflow CMS. Created a 'Bulletins' collection with fields: date, title, PDF file. Gloria Tate has Webflow Editor access and can upload directly. No code deploy needed for routine uploads.

VBS volunteer form is live on staging at shiloh-staging.webflow.io/vbs-volunteers. Theresa Nguyen reviewed the form fields and requested adding a background check consent checkbox for volunteers working directly with minors. Adding now.

Evaluated Smash Balloon Social Photo Feed plugin vs Webflow custom embed. Smash Balloon is simpler but adds 40KB of JavaScript. Going with a custom Instagram oEmbed for now — lighter weight and sufficient for a weekly post display. Will need Instagram Business account connected.
